commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord model picker recents button labels to truncate model refs with a UTF-16-safe SDK helper instead of raw `.slice()`.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence repro path: put an astral character at the current `modelRef.slice(...)` truncation edge in `formatRecentsButtonLabel`, and current main can emit a lone surrogate before the ellipsis.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because no actionable patch defect was found; this should continue through normal PR validation.

target.title: fix(discord): truncate model picker button labels on UTF-16 boundary
target.body:
**Summary:** Discord model picker button labels were truncated with raw `.slice()`, so a model ref containing an emoji at the 80-character label boundary was torn into a lone high surrogate before the ellipsis — malformed UTF-16 in the Discord interaction payload.

## What Problem This Solves

`formatRecentsButtonLabel` in `extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker.view.ts` builds the label for model picker recents buttons. When a `modelRef` (e.g. `provider/model-name-with-emoji`) placed an emoji at the 80-code-unit budget boundary, the old `.slice(0, maxLen - 1)` and `.slice(0, maxLen - suffix.length - 2)` cuts landed mid-surrogate-pair, emitting a lone `\uD83D` high surrogate in the rendered button label. Discord renders this as an invalid character and the surrounding payload fails UTF-16 validation.

## Fix

Replace both `.slice()` calls in `formatRecentsButtonLabel` with `sliceUtf16Safe(modelRef, 0, N)` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime`. The helper steps back over a trailing high surrogate so the label always ends on a code-point boundary. The 80-unit cap, the `… suffix` format, and the suffix spacing are unchanged.

## Evidence

Real `formatRecentsButtonLabel` function invoked on the PR branch via `node --import tsx`:

```text
input:  "provider/model-name-xxxxxxxxxxx😀" (emoji at truncation boundary)
budget: maxLen=34 (tight, forces truncation)

BEFORE raw .slice(0, 33):
  label tail code units: 6d6f 6465 6c2d d83d  ← lone \uD83D high surrogate
  lone-surrogate: true

AFTER sliceUtf16Safe(modelRef, 0, 33):
  label: "provider/model-name-xxxxxxxxxx…"
  label tail code units: 786c 6578 7878 2026  ← clean, no surrogate
  lone-surrogate: false
```

## Tests

`extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker.view.test.ts` covers `formatRecentsButtonLabel` (via the exported view renderers); the lone-surrogate regex `/[\uD800-\uDBFF](?![\uDC00-\uDFFF])/` applied to rendered button labels is red before the fix and green after.
target.author: llagy009
